clean geometric sans-serif, uniform stroke width, circles-and-squares letterforms, Bauhaus-inspired proportions

letters formed from lush blooming flowers and foliage, layered botanical petals and verdant green leaves with delicate dewy detail
letters carved from natural wood, visible flowing grain, hand-chiselled relief, warm organic texture with soft sanded edges
